name: Takeda Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Takeda Machinery Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells metalworking machines and tools in Japan. It provides small shaped steel processing machines, flat plate drilling machines, H-shaped steel drilling machines, and steel plate processing machines. The company also offers circular saw machines, such as shaped steel cutting, unprocessed steel cutting, and pipe cutting machines, as well as dies. Takeda Machinery Co., Ltd. was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Nomi, Japan.
